what_it_does: Lists absolute file-system paths of files in the Visual Designer project, serving as a full inventory or migration manifest.
observations: Contains absolute paths rooted at /mnt/c/Users/Workstation001/Documents/Claude/Projects/Visual Designer
Mix of markdown documentation, code, configuration, SQL, HTML, JSON, and Obsidian metadata files

Spans multiple sub-projects: Visual_DNA, content-workbench, Visual-DNA-Vault, Corpus-Extraction-Vault, packages/elevenlabs-mcp, packages/vi-invariant, packages/wizard-contracts, packages/wizard-edge-client, .cursor, .claude
Many files appear duplicated across Visual_DNA and Visual-DNA-Vault (e.g., Eleven labs Wizard / ElevenLabs-Wizard, references, Proto)
Includes package-lock.json, tsconfig.json, fly.toml, vite.config.ts, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js, entrypoint.sh, and SQL migration scripts
File is truncated near the end (ends mid-path)
standouts: Large overlap between Visual_DNA and Visual-DNA-Vault directories
Presence of multiple npm packages (elevenlabs-mcp, vi-invariant, wizard-contracts, wizard-edge-client)
Heavy documentation-to-code ratio with many design, audit, and research markdown files
conventions: Uses absolute POSIX-style paths under a WSL mount
Paths contain spaces in directory names (Visual Designer, Eleven labs Wizard)
No annotations, sizes, checksums, or per-entry metadata
concerns: Truncated before completion, so the manifest is not verifiably full
Absolute paths tie the manifest to a specific workstation and WSL layout
Does not distinguish source-of-truth copies from duplicates
notes: A flat, absolute-path inventory of the Visual Designer project intended for migration analysis, but it is truncated and contains apparent duplicate directories.
questions: What criteria determined which files were included or excluded?
Is this manifest auto-generated or hand-curated?
Which directory is the intended migration source of truth: Visual_DNA, Visual-DNA-Vault, or content-workbench?
intention_signals: To enumerate every project file so a migration or consolidation wizard can reason over the full set of source, documentation, and configuration artefacts.
contribution: Provides a single flat enumeration of file paths that a fused system can use as the starting inventory for deduplication, migration scoping, and path mapping.
summary_for_embedding: A truncated absolute-path manifest of all files in the Visual Designer project across multiple subdirectories, used as a migration inventory.
intention_for_embedding: To enumerate every project file as input to a migration or consolidation process.
